narrative:
Mccomb (precinct in Hancock County) has 903 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
